verdict.summary: Guide is practically useful and mostly aligned with 2026 reality, but it over-generalizes portal-rf as a main AIMA entry point, has an imprecise/possibly wrong legal attribution for Manifestação de Interesse, lacks the official fee-table source, and cites a misleading Diário da República URL.

issues.problem: portal-rf.aima.gov.pt is not a universal/main AIMA booking portal for all residence-permit workflows. It is a specific portal, notably associated with reagrupamento familiar/family-reunification workflows, and should not be presented next to aima.gov.pt as a general entry point for D1-D8, renewals, replacements, etc. This can send readers into the wrong workflow.
issues.suggestion: Write instead: "Основной вход — aima.gov.pt; отдельные процессы AIMA может перенаправлять на специальные порталы, например portal-rf.aima.gov.pt для reagrupamento familiar, если ваш случай туда относится."

issues.problem: The title again suggests that portal-rf is a general online booking route. The body text is more cautious, but the heading is misleading for readers scanning the guide.
issues.suggestion: Rename to: "2. Пробовать онлайн: aima.gov.pt и специальные порталы, если AIMA туда направляет". In the checklist, add: "portal-rf.aima.gov.pt используйте только если ваш процесс действительно относится к этому порталу, например reagrupamento familiar."

issues.current: Manifestação de Interesse: старый режим закрыт Lei 61/2025 с 23.10.2025; не планируйте workflow как в 2022–2024
issues.problem: This is too compressed and potentially misleading. The Manifestação de Interesse route under the old arts. 88/89 workflow was already ended in 2024 by the immigration-law changes introduced by Decreto-Lei 37-A/2024. Lei 61/2025 may be relevant to the later consolidated regime and is in force from 23.10.2025, but readers may wrongly infer that MI remained normally available until 23.10.2025.
issues.suggestion: Write instead: "Manifestação de Interesse: старый workflow arts. 88/89 больше не является доступным путём для новых заявок; он был закрыт реформой 2024 года, а последующие изменения Lei 61/2025 действуют с 23.10.2025. Не планируйте процесс как в 2022–2024; для старых pending cases проверяйте переходные правила отдельно."

issues.current: "title": "Lei 61/2025 — изменения миграционного режима, в силе с 23.10.2025", "url": "https://diariodarepublica.pt/dr/legislacao-consolidada/lei/2007-34563275"
issues.problem: The URL points to consolidated legislation for the foreigners law, not directly to the Diário da República page for Lei 61/2025. The title promises the specific amending law, so the reference is misleading and hard to verify.
issues.suggestion: Use two separate sources: one exact Diário da República URL for Lei 61/2025, and one consolidated Lei 23/2007 link if you want the current consolidated regime. Title the consolidated link as "Lei 23/2007 — versão consolidada" rather than "Lei 61/2025".

issues.current: Деньги на сборы: после 01.03.2026 admission стоит 133 €, стандартный art. 75 — 307,20 €
issues.problem: The fee values appear plausible for the post-01.03.2026 AIMA table, but the guide gives no direct official source for these sensitive numbers. Also "admission" is not a clear Portuguese administrative-fee label for readers; it should be tied to the exact item in the AIMA fee table.
issues.suggestion: Keep the amounts only with a direct source and clearer wording, e.g. "по таблице AIMA, действующей с 01.03.2026: taxa de receção/análise do pedido — 133 €; emissão/concessão de AR art. 75 — 307,20 €; проверяйте строку таблицы для вашего основания." Add the official AIMA fee-table source to sources.
issues.source: AIMA fee table in force from 01.03.2026; Portaria 480-A/2025/1

issues.problem: Same issue as above: "admission fee" is ambiguous and not enough to identify the exact legal/tariff item. Readers may think this is always charged for every appointment.
issues.suggestion: Rename to the exact fee-table concept and add a caveat: "Taxa de receção/análise do pedido, если применимо". Keep the note that it depends on the type of pedido.
issues.source: AIMA fee table in force from 01.03.2026; Portaria 480-A/2025/1

issues.current: No source for AIMA fees is listed.
issues.problem: The guide quotes exact 2026 AIMA amounts but sources only include AIMA homepage, ePortugal homepage, and a consolidated-law link. For exact fees, a homepage is not enough.
issues.suggestion: Add an official source specifically for the AIMA 2026 fee table, preferably the AIMA page/PDF for "Tabela de Taxas" in force from 01.03.2026 and/or the relevant Portaria.
issues.source: AIMA fee table in force from 01.03.2026; Portaria 480-A/2025/1

issues.current: Там могут помочь открыть ePortugal/AIMA, проверить доступ, распечатать доказательства, иногда направить к правильному balcão или объяснить, какой сервис сейчас активен.
issues.problem: This is mostly fair, but it may still overstate what Espaço Cidadão can do for AIMA. Espaço Cidadão support depends on the specific counter and on which AIMA/ePortugal mediated services are active. They generally cannot submit or alter most residence-permit processes unless that exact service is available through the assisted-digital-service channel.
issues.suggestion: Add a caveat: "Возможности зависят от конкретного Espaço Cidadão и от того, есть ли активный serviço mediado для вашего типа процесса; большинство решений по ВНЖ они не принимают и не заменяют atendimento AIMA."

missing_topics: A direct official source for the AIMA fee table effective from 01.03.2026 should be included because exact fee amounts are quoted.
Clarify that portal-rf.aima.gov.pt is process-specific, not a generic appointment system for all AIMA residence-permit cases.
Clarify transitional treatment for old pending Manifestação de Interesse cases versus new applications after the 2024 closure and later Lei 61/2025 changes.

Mention that AIMA appointment/notification links and channels change frequently; readers should verify the exact service page for their visa category or residence-permit basis before using any portal.
